text.message: blue trade me first sheep if i leave you 4 9 11?
If you leave me wheat port than yea
i have to fight wheat port
if blue gets to wheat port we're done guys
Are you really gonna non bind
dude you soloed me for 15 turns
do the trade black i give you wheat?
Also the solo we were racing
i thought you wanted anything else but wood black?
well well it was not anything then
i wasnt talking to you when I said "anything but woof"
well with my trade you could have gotten "anything but wood"
green you make no sense, I'm not gonna give you a trade that helps you if it doesnt help me
well it would have helped you since you would have gotten rid of the wood
if you rob me, I’m gonna be annoyed
nice you wanted the wheat after all  ;)
I'll need an ally cause blue is griefing
I soloed greeen last turn lol
and u apologized, so it was not ur intention
I haven’t soloed you since we were racing
You have the best setup by far
you just robbed me over someone who has a city
i have the best setup? lol
im not sure about that solo for real
what block should he have made?
tbh blocking a low number only makes sense if it’s a winning roll
you really are a griefer eh
tbh blue is so far ahead it doesn’t matter who they rob
Black how you think I am griefing is beyond me
how am i the rob over green here? lmao
You are closer to road and have two better ports
not seeing green has more space to settle and road
yeah you have a tougher game haha
Also that block hurts green more than you so robbing you is fair if you are equal
being "equal" has never been a catan factor lol
if he was at 9 would you try to be "equal"?
I’m saying I think you guys are in a similar spot
yeah thats not an ally block, red
I agree that solo was wild lol
red, you said blue was SO AHEAD, and the 6 doesnt hurt him at all
so no, it wasnt on the 6
he literally soloed the last player, I soloed the first
he robbed 4 times in a row over green
i was triple robbed being last man
Sometimes talking nonstop  doesn’t help you
10 is just a great spot for blue
it’s not my problem if you’re also on it
yeah soloing the last player doesnt help you either
red if you think the 6 wheat is the block i should be doing, you should be doing the 9 wheat no?
I feel like blocking wheat is pointless from me
i should be soloing blue all game btw
but I think he loses anyway
he just wants this to end
you could have traded the win there
oh he genuinely wanted to to that block? lol
Also you blocked the 10 for no reason when green was the block
I’m just trying to win with the situation I’m in
you guys should be doing the same lol
not tracking every block to decide who to revenge
blue triple robbed me out of spite "for talking too much"
Ok well I need devs to keep army so I need ore
we want red to have it lol?
after you blocking me 3 times when he had 2 cities?
Black being annoying does not help you
